name: ai-arch-template-swarm-governance-starter
description: Governance harness for coordinator/worker agent teams: deny-by-default IAM, a fail-closed three-tier escalation ladder (autonomous / coordinator-approval / human-approval), an append-only decision ledger, and a plug-point for the agent-payments-guard MCP server as the spend-cap backend. No LLM calls — this is the harness your agent loop runs inside.
